notes: Solid implementation covering all required features. Security positives: timingSafeEqual for CSRF, bcrypt, HttpOnly+SameSite=Strict cookies, anti-enumeration on forgot-password, BoundedMap prevents OOM, rate limiting per IP and per account. Security negatives: reset token logged to console (line 367, serious leak), register endpoint leaks email existence (409), /metrics endpoint unauthenticated, sessions not invalidated on password reset, no absolute session timeout (renewSession extends indefinitely), sanitizeInput trims password whitespace silently. Error handling: try/catch on login/register but missing on forgot-password and reset-password routes; hashSync in redeemPasswordResetToken can throw unhandled; parseInt on env vars has no NaN guard. Best practices: good structure and separation, startup env validation, periodic cleanup, but uses hashSync (blocks event loop) inconsistently with async hash elsewhere, custom cookie parser is fragile vs cookie-parser library. Robustness: BoundedMap with eviction is good, graceful shutdown with timeout fallback, body size limit, but SlidingWindowLimiter stores raw timestamp arrays (memory-inefficient at scale).
